certificates.claim: the optimal sorting-network size for n=2 is exactly 1

lower_bound.method: exhaustive enumeration over candidate space + monotone-extension lemma
lower_bound.input_check: all 2^2 binary vectors (complete by the 0/1 principle)

certificates.level: L1-exhaustive-candidate-space (our own machinery; an external re-checkable artifact would make it L2)
